alkylation reagent: Iodoacetamide was then added to the reaction sample
alkylation concentration: at a final concentration of 5 mM for 30 min at 25°C in dark
cleavage agent: the first-step digestion was achieved by Lys-C (0.05 μg/μl)
instrument: coupled with a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: sprayed through a Nanospray Flex source
labeling: Chemical cross-linking coupled with mass spectrometry (MS) provides information of proximal amino acid residues within proteins and protein complexes.
reduction reagent: followed by 30-min incubation with 2.5 mM TCEP
